name: swiggy-restaurant-scraper
title: Swiggy Restaurant Scraper - Listings, Ratings & Delivery Data
description: Scrape public Swiggy restaurant listings with names, cuisines, ratings, delivery time, cost for two, offers, locality, image URLs, and restaurant URLs.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the run starts to cover browser startup and the residential proxy session. Number of events depends on memory (one per GB, minimum one).

restaurant-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean Swiggy restaurant record saved to the dataset.
